violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025
The following were in poor repair and out of service prior to inspection: -small ice machine -1 door lowboy in drive thru area New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving fixtures, exterior of equipment and area between counter tops have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Per PIC, active leaking occurs over coffee tap system when AC is on. During time of inspection AC was off and no active leaking was observed; PIC states work order is in place. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 08/28/2025
Donuts in front case were observed in direct contact with small flies. Foods were voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2025

The presence of small flies is not controlled as evidenced by live insects observed during time of inspection. Bakery case items to be excluded from pests. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/29/2025

The quaternary ammonium concentration in the sanitizing solution of the 3-bay sink was 50 parts per million (ppm). According to the manufacturer's use directions, the concentration of the quaternary ammonium must be 200-400 ppm. Establishment must wash, rinse, and sanitize dishes and equipment by manually mixing sanitizing solution to appropriate concentration. Service was called at time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Utensils (stirrers) were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. PIC removed stirrers from stagnant water and moved to clean dry surface. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface (floor) that is not clean in the shed storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
Refrigerator door gasket on the walk-in cooler door was observed in poor repair. Refrigerator door gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of equipment including the coffee makers and walls have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2024
The floor tiles in the back receiving area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/05/2025
